name: tModLoader (Terraria)
author: ops@refx.example
description: Terraria with mod support. SteamCMD-installed tModLoader dedicated server with workshop modpacks.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 1281930 validate +quit
chmod +x start-tModLoaderServer.sh || true
# Seed tModLoader serverconfig.txt from panel vars (referenced via -config).
TCFG=/mnt/server/serverconfig.txt
if [ ! -f "$TCFG" ]; then
  WORLDDIR=/mnt/server/.local/share/Terraria/tModLoader/Worlds
  mkdir -p "$WORLDDIR"
  {
    echo "maxplayers=${MAX_PLAYERS}"
    echo "autocreate=${AUTOCREATE}"
    echo "worldname=${WORLD_NAME}"
    echo "world=${WORLDDIR}/${WORLD_NAME}.wld"
    echo "worldpath=${WORLDDIR}"
    [ -n "${SERVER_PASSWORD}" ] && echo "password=${SERVER_PASSWORD}"
  } > "$TCFG"
fi
echo 'tModLoader install complete.'

variables.description: Name of the world file to load or create.
Size used when auto-creating a new world: 1 small, 2 medium, 3 large.
Leave blank for an open server.

longDescription: Run modded Terraria with tModLoader and Steam Workshop modpacks on a dedicated server.
